project.name: InvoiceKit
project.one_liner: Generate and send branded invoices from a browser, no signup to try.

dimensions.name: Pain evidence (primary)

evidence.excerpt: 6 freelancers: 'I dread invoicing, my spreadsheet template looks unprofessional.'
r/freelance thread, 40+ comments on 'what do you use to invoice clients?'

gaps.summary: Interviews skew to design freelancers; other verticals unverified

next_actions: Interview 5 non-design freelancers (consultants, trades) to test breadth

dimensions.name: User language & intent

evidence.excerpt: Users say 'send an invoice', 'get paid faster', 'invoice template' — not 'billing automation'.

gaps.summary: Glossary exists but queries not yet tagged by intent class

next_actions: Tag top phrases by intent (informational 'how to invoice' vs solution 'free invoice generator')

dimensions.name: Keyword opportunity

evidence.excerpt: 'free invoice generator' high volume/high competition; 'invoice template for consultants' long-tail, beatable.

gaps.summary: Not yet split into popular-vs-opportunity buckets

next_actions: Score candidates by intent × relevance × 1/competition × product_fit; prioritize long-tail

dimensions.name: SERP / competition

evidence.excerpt: Head terms owned by established SaaS; long-tail templates have thin, dated pages.

gaps.summary: Head SERP is authority-dominated; only long-tail is realistically winnable

next_actions: Target the winnable long-tail template queries, not the head terms

dimensions.name: Channel selection (1–2 deep)

evidence.excerpt: Leaning Google Search + a free-tool link-magnet, plus r/freelance participation.

gaps.summary: Two channels named but conversion path from Reddit not yet defined

next_actions: Commit to Google Search (high intent) + free-tool pages; define the Reddit → site path

dimensions.name: Directory strategy

evidence.excerpt: 'best invoicing tools' listicles rank; single product, no portfolio.

gaps.summary: Portfolio fit low (1 product) → third-party listings over owned directory

next_actions: List in 3–5 trusted SaaS/freelance-tool directories that already rank

dimensions.name: Content assets & format

evidence.excerpt: One blog post; no free-template pages yet despite clear demand.

gaps.summary: No pain-first template/how-to content matching search intent

next_actions: Ship free 'invoice template for <vertical>' pages that double as the product entry point

dimensions.name: Landing page / on-page SEO

evidence.excerpt: Headline 'Invoicing, simplified' — generic; try-without-signup is a strong hook though.

gaps.summary: Headline doesn't match user language ('send a professional invoice free')

next_actions: Rewrite headline to user language and surface the no-signup try above the fold

dimensions.name: App Store Optimization
dimensions.na_reason: No app-store surface — InvoiceKit ships on the web only, so ASO does not apply and is excluded from the score.

dimensions.name: GEO / AI visibility

evidence.excerpt: No llms.txt; occasionally mentioned in one 'best invoicing tools' list AI cites.

gaps.summary: Thin presence in curated lists AI assistants cite

next_actions: Add llms.txt; earn inclusion in comparison lists Perplexity/ChatGPT cite

dimensions.name: Conversion / activation / retention

evidence.excerpt: Tracks signups; no metric for 'first invoice sent' or repeat use.

gaps.summary: Signup-only tracking; first-value (first invoice sent) not measured

next_actions: Define first successful action (first invoice sent) and measure time-to-first-value

dimensions.name: Measurement & learning loop

gaps.summary: No attribution from activation back to keyword/channel/content

next_actions: Add UTM + event pipeline so 'first invoice sent' attributes to its source

stages.name: Problem awareness
stages.note: Clear problem statement in user words

stages.name: Emotional hook
stages.note: No-signup try is a hook; headline generic

stages.name: App Store optimization
stages.na_reason: Web-only product — no App Store surface to optimize.

channel_recommendation.directory_call: Track B: strategic third-party listings (single product — owned directory not yet justified)
channel_recommendation.rationale: Search intent for invoicing is high and lives in Google; free 'invoice template' pages double as SEO and product entry. Reddit (r/freelance) is where the documented pain and peer trust sit. No app-store channel — InvoiceKit is web-only, so it converts on the website.

red_flags.assumption: SEO content should be built around keywords, not user pain
Tracking signups is enough to know what's working

top_actions.summary: Ship free 'invoice template for <vertical>' pages that double as the product entry point
Define first successful action (first invoice sent) and measure time-to-first-value
Rewrite landing headline to user language and surface the no-signup try above the fold
Commit to Google Search + free-tool pages and define the Reddit → site conversion path
Add UTM + event pipeline so 'first invoice sent' attributes to its source
